name: Ransomware: Ryuk Service or Process Termination
notes:
This rule triggers when Ryuk ransomware terminates running processes after making a copy of itself.

Note: The Ryuk Service and Process Termination List reference set has been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Set with relevant services and processes.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '(net1|net|taskkill|sc|powershell|kill)\.(exe|bat)' AQL filter query
when any of Terminated Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Ryuk Service and Process Termination List - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Process Name (custom) and different Terminated Process Name (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Process Name (custom) and different Terminated Process Name (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: Ryuk Service or Process Termination on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '(net1|net|taskkill|sc|powershell|kill)\.(exe|bat)' AQL filter query
AND when any of Terminated Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Ryuk Service and Process Termination List - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Process Name (custom) and different Terminated Process Name (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event description: Detects when Ryuk ransomware terminates running processes after making a copy of itself.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
